description: Conversation recaps two past events (board dinner last Tuesday, offsite the week before) then pivots to scheduling a real future meeting on Monday morning. Model must ignore past events and capture only the future one.

events.title: Roadmap Review
events.reasoning: Alice asks Carol to meet Monday morning at 8:30 at the office to walk through roadmap decisions before Carol starts the design phase. Carol confirms the time and brings wireframes. Alice specifies it should not take more than an hour.
events.assumptions: Monday = Feb 23; 'shouldn't take more than an hour' interpreted as 1-hour block

mock_llm_response.summary: One future event extracted: a roadmap review meeting on Monday Feb 23 at 8:30 AM at the office. Past events (board dinner last Tuesday, offsite the week before) are historical and not extracted.

notes: Past then future pattern. Two past events are discussed in detail but must be ignored. The model must identify the tense shift when Alice says 'can we meet Monday morning?' and extract only the confirmed future event.
